mapper.select:
SELECT id, sku, product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", available_qty as "availableQuantity", reserved_qty as "reserved", stock_status as "status", stm_state as "stateId" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat
AND product_id = #{productId} AND variant_id = #{variantId}

SELECT id, sku, product_id as "productId", product_name as "productName", category_name as "categoryName", seller_id as "sellerId", seller_name as "sellerName", warehouse_name as "warehouseName", variant_id as "variantId", available_qty as "availableQuantity", reserved_qty as "reserved", damaged_qty as "damagedQuantity", inbound_qty as "inboundQuantity", low_stock_threshold as "lowStockThreshold", stock_status as "status", stm_state as "stateId", days_of_supply as "daysOfSupply", avg_daily_sales as "avgDailySales", last_sale_at as "lastSaleAt", last_restock_at as "lastRestockAt", cost_price as "costPrice", locked_capital as "lockedCapital", batch_number as "batchNumber", expiry_date as "expiryDate" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, sku, product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", warehouse_name as "warehouseName", available_qty as "availableQuantity", reserved_qty as "reserved", damaged_qty as "damagedQuantity", stock_status as "status", stm_state as "stateId" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT stock_status as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat GROUP BY stock_status ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT stm_state as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE stm_state IS NOT NULL GROUP BY stm_state ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT DISTINCT seller_id as "sellerId", seller_name as "sellerName" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE seller_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY seller_name
SELECT DISTINCT warehouse_name as "warehouseName", warehouse_code as "warehouseCode" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE warehouse_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY warehouse_name

SELECT id, sku, product_id as "productId", product_name as "productName", seller_name as "sellerName", warehouse_name as "warehouseName", available_qty as "availableQuantity", reserved_qty as "reserved", low_stock_threshold as "lowStockThreshold", days_of_supply as "daysOfSupply", stock_status as "status", stm_state as "stateId" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE stock_status = 'LOW_STOCK' AND warehouse_name = #{warehouseName} AND seller_id = #{sellerId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE stock_status = 'OUT_OF_STOCK'

SELECT id, sku, product_id as "productId", product_name as "productName", seller_name as "sellerName", warehouse_name as "warehouseName", available_qty as "availableQuantity", days_without_sale as "daysWithoutSale", stock_status as "status", stm_state as "stateId" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE stock_status = 'OUT_OF_STOCK' ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT warehouse_name as "fulfillmentCenter", warehouse_code as "warehouseCode", COUNT(*) as "itemCount", SUM(available_qty) as "totalAvailable", SUM(reserved_qty) as "totalReserved", SUM(damaged_qty) as "totalDamaged", COUNT(CASE WHEN stock_status = 'IN_STOCK' THEN 1 END) as "inStockCount", COUNT(CASE WHEN stock_status = 'LOW_STOCK' THEN 1 END) as "lowStockCount", COUNT(CASE WHEN stock_status = 'OUT_OF_STOCK' THEN 1 END) as "outOfStockCount" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat GROUP BY warehouse_name, warehouse_code ORDER BY warehouse_name
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE days_without_sale >= 30 AND available_qty > 0

SELECT id, sku, product_id as "productId", product_name as "productName", seller_name as "sellerName", warehouse_name as "warehouseName", available_qty as "availableQuantity", cost_price as "costPrice", locked_capital as "lockedCapital", days_without_sale as "daysWithoutSale", last_sale_at as "lastSaleAt" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE days_without_sale >= 30 AND available_qty > 0 ORDER BY locked_capital DESC ${pagination}
